### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Client\.Aggregates](Hexalith.EventStore.Client.Aggregates.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Client\.Aggregates')

## AggregateReplayer Class

Side\-effect\-free replay engine that drives a domain state type's runtime Apply convention
against an event list\. Used by [EventStoreAggregate&lt;TState&gt;](Hexalith.EventStore.Client.Aggregates.EventStoreAggregate_TState_.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Client\.Aggregates\.EventStoreAggregate\<TState\>') to satisfy the
canonical `/replay-state` contract; the same Apply discovery is shared with
[Hexalith\.EventStore\.Client\.Handlers\.DomainProcessorStateRehydrator](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/hexalith.eventstore.client.handlers.domainprocessorstaterehydrator 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Client\.Handlers\.DomainProcessorStateRehydrator') so command\-time and replay\-time semantics stay aligned\.

```csharp
public static class AggregateReplayer
```
